A mission-driven consulting firm helping communities grow stronger through strategy, training, and people-centered solutions.

📞 Book Free Consultation 📄 Download Impact Report 🤝 Work With Us

Who We Are

People & Humanity Consult (P&H Consult) partners with nonprofits, governments, and social enterprises to build stronger systems in health, education, and governance. Since 2021, we’ve supported communities across Africa with smart ideas and measurable impact.

Digital Literacy

Equipping communities and teams with tech skills and software infrastructure management for a digital world.

Modern Agriculture

Promoting food security through sustainable farming techniques and precision agri-business solutions.

Social Entrepreneurship

Designing mission-driven business models that create lasting social impact and dignified livelihoods.
